commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio -n kube-system get pods -l name=nvidia-device-plugin-ds'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get nodes -l workload-type=gpu -o custom-columns=NAME:.metadata.name,GPU:.status.allocatable.nvidia\.com/gpu'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio delete pod -n yanxi-validation gpu-smoke --force --grace-period=0 --ignore-not-found=true 2>&1 | tail -2'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get pod -n yanxi-validation gpu-smoke -o wide'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio logs -n yanxi-validation gpu-smoke 2>&1 | tail -40'
